Our Story

The Real Nashville, in Amman.

Dust N' Dip brings authentic Nashville hot chicken to the heart of Amman. We obsess over the crunch — perfectly seasoned, fried to order, with heat levels that go from a gentle warmth all the way to a proper challenge.

Our sauces are made fresh. The chili honey is real honey — not syrup — drizzled over your bird just before it hits your hands. We take the technique seriously so every bite is worth it.

4.5★

We're open late, every night

What People Say

From the Regulars

★★★★★

"One of the best fried chicken spots right now — very tasty and clean. The chili honey is the top sauce, real honey not syrup. You get your money's worth."

— Google Reviewer
★★★★★

"I've tried many Nashville chicken spots in the area and believed none truly captured the authentic flavor — until this experience. Completely changed my perspective."

— Google Reviewer
★★★★★

"From their tenders to their sides, it was very delicious and worth the wait. I don't always do reviews, but this restaurant has been an experience."

— Google Reviewer
